mapper.insert: insert into GOLD_HEDGE_STRATEGY_INSTANCE ( INSTANCE_ID, TAG_NAME, STRATEGY_ID, SYMBOL_CONFIG_ID, TAG_CODE, STATUS, CONFIG_SNAPSHOT, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, TRADER_NO, REMARK, DEL_FLAG, INITIAL_POSITION_SNAP, STRATEGY_NAME ) VALUES ( #{instanceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tagName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{strategyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{symbolConfigId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tagCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{configSnapshot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{traderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{initialPositionSnap,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{strategyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE GOLD_HEDGE_STRATEGY_INSTANCE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FINAL_POSITION_SNAP = #{finalPositionSnap,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUM_QTY = #{cumQty,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM GOLD_HEDGE_STRATEGY_INSTANCE sc where sc.INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND sc.DEL_FLAG = '0'
